title: Office of the Chief Accessibility Officer - Canada.ca
content:
## Office of the Chief Accessibility Officer
The Office of the Chief Accessibility Officer (OCAO) works to support the efforts of the CAO to monitor and report on accessibility outcomes.
Subscribe to receive news and updates from the OCAO
- Accessible Canada Act
- Reports and publications

## Services and information

### Talking accessibility
A series of conversations demonstrating lived experiences with accessibility, what it really means and why it matters.
- Contact general inquiries
- Contact media relations
